reason: Five accepted generation-cache PNGs were archived to stable output paths by the main thread after visual QC. The background thread was still active during the final status poll and had not yet written the stable files, so no additional generation retry was requested.

threads.title: 断航故土基础材质板图片生成
threads.notes: The thread generated usable image caches but did not write the final stable paths before the main thread completed the archive copy. It was observed idle after final validation. Existing style, regional color, emblem, history, bible, and script assets were not modified.

image_assets_created.visual_qc: accepted; worn Zhaoming relic material system, partial sun-moon and astrolabe language, no readable text or standalone new emblem
accepted; insect wax white, brittle paper, translucent wing membrane, black lacquer contrast, no modern laboratory cue or readable text
accepted; blackstone, snow line, worn leather and bone details, array trace obscured by cracks, no full seal or standalone emblem
accepted; wet grain-production steam, rope, gear, brass measure and blackened machinery, no readable text or cheerful steampunk polish
accepted; bone, weathered wood, fur, red cord and cold ground texture, no mascot logic or modern metal dominance

retry_notes: The background thread rejected earlier border-wall candidates for over-complete seal or emblem-like drift and accepted the third border candidate.
The background thread rejected the first Jinhe candidate for word-like marks on the measure strip and accepted the regenerated Jinhe candidate.
Main thread copied accepted cache PNGs to the requested stable output paths because the target directory was still empty after the generation cache contained the complete usable set.
